subcodes.first_line: O Yahya! The promise hath been fulfilled, and the Spirit crieth out amidst the servants: "Verily, they who claim knowledge and understanding..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یحیی قد اتی الوعد و الروح ینادی بین العباد ان الذین یدعون العلم و العرفان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment
